finding_results.notes: Beni now tops out at two clipped replies in each pressure cluster before shifting into a fuller lie or half-confession. The added specifics give Eszter new leverage and keep the exchange escalating instead of stalling in repeated question-and-block.

summary: Reworked the kitchen confrontation so Beni's evasions stay character-true but stop reading like payroll fragments: he now moves from clipped answers into concrete misdirection, Eszter presses on the new specifics, and the argument keeps gaining pressure.
